questionText: Fill in the blank: The chef decided to ___ the vegetables thinly.
Choose the correct preposition: She has been working at this company ___ 2018.
Identify the closest synonym for the word 'ubiquitous':
Select the correct conditional verb form: If I ___ known you were visiting, I would have baked a cake.
Which of the following is a grammatically correct sentence?

options.A: He don't like playing soccer on weekends.
options.B: She can to speak three different languages.
options.C: I has been to Paris twice this year.
options.D: They are going to the market later today.
